info.title: OpenABM API
info.description: Contract skeleton for OpenABM ingest, trace search, scoring, datasets, behaviors, prompts, automations, and MCP-adjacent read APIs.

get.summary: Expose local reference metrics in text form.

post.summary: Create a draft behavior definition.
Backtest a behavior detector over matching traces.
Create an auditable context pack from trace evidence.
Create a data classification policy.

get.summary: List retention policies for a project.

post.summary: Create a retention policy record.
Dry-run or apply a retention policy and record cleanup effects.
Export project data with a hash manifest.
Classify a payload against a deterministic policy.

get.summary: List human review tasks for model and detector outputs.

post.summary: Create a human review task for an evidence-backed candidate.
Create a notification or workflow target using validated secret refs.
Create an automation definition.
Preview traces matching an automation's deterministic conditions.
Run an automation once with idempotency, cooldown, retry, and dead-letter checks.
Create a draft dataset and first immutable version.
Create a dataset example from a source trace.

get.summary: List offline eval runs for a project.

post.summary: Run a local eval over a dataset version with explicit or registered judges.

503.description: Model provider unavailable for model-backed judges.

get.summary: List persisted results for an offline eval run.

post.summary: Compare two eval runs and report pass-rate, score, failure, and cost deltas.

get.summary: List grounding checks for a project.

post.summary: Check explicit or model-extracted claims against trace evidence.

503.description: Model provider unavailable for claim extraction.

post.summary: Run passive novelty detection over recent traces with optional model grouping.

503.description: Model provider unavailable for semantic grouping.

get.summary: List impact reports for a project.

post.summary: Ingest traces, spans, events, feedback, and payloads with partial success.
Ingest one span event.
Ingest feedback associated with a trace or span.
Store a payload object or payload metadata marker.
Ingest one span envelope.
Ingest one trace envelope.
Start a deterministic investigation run over trace data.
Create a human or customer reported issue.
Create an issue from screenshot intake metadata.

201.description: Screenshot issue and candidate seed traces.

post.summary: Create issue and investigation artifacts from a chat message.
Search committed public OpenABM docs and schemas.

get.summary: Fetch a judge with immutable versions.
Summarize judge eval results and human review labels.

post.summary: Promote a judge when calibration and review gates pass.
Create a draft judge from an explicit definition or local-model request.

201.description: Draft judge created and review task queued.

503.description: Model provider unavailable for natural-language drafting.

post.summary: Commit an immutable judge version.
Run a model-backed rubric judge on a trace and persist a cited score.

get.summary: List projects visible to the caller.
List saved searches for a project.

post.summary: Create a reusable saved trace search.

get.summary: Get a saved search by ID.

post.summary: Search similar traces or spans when a similarity index is configured.
Search spans with structured and text filters.
Search traces with structured and text filters.

get.summary: Fetch a session and its traces.

post.summary: Create a prompt definition.

get.summary: Fetch a prompt and its versions.

post.summary: Commit an immutable prompt version.
Render a prompt version deterministically.
Diff two prompt versions.
Create an agent runtime configuration record.

get.summary: Fetch an agent config and its versions.

post.summary: Commit an immutable agent config version.
Compare two agent config versions.
Attach a business dimension to a trace.

get.summary: List traces with structured filters and pagination.

delete.summary: Tombstone a trace and remove derived payload.

post.summary: Persist a human-confirmed behavior label for a trace.
Run deterministic trace assertions against captured spans.
